<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
  <head>
    <script>
      var assetId = window.frameElement.getAttribute('data-asset-id');
      if (assetId) {
        var content = window.parent.cpsAssetContents[assetId];
        document.write(decodeURIComponent(content));
      }
    </script>
  </head>
  <body style="margin: 0"></body>
</html>
